texto: I forced myself out of a love that I knew would only end fatally.I forced myself into the dark, until I could no longer remember how to feel with my eyes. I forced my mind to believethat someone would hold youbetter than I ever could. But the worst part was selling my soulfor a price I know I'll never repay, and forcing myself into lovewith someone who wasn't you
explicacao: Citação de jl sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “I forced myself out of a love that I knew would only end fatally.I forced myself into the dark, u…” articula amor, heartbreak, love em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como termino e reflexao-noturna.
